SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST MARIO O'MEDO BELLOCCI, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-21-2008, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-06-2008. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: RITA ARLENE HOWELL, CSR#2542. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-21-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Nici Rodich, CSR# 11604. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2008 Continued To Jul-21-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 7/21/2008 at 1:30 PM in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Rita Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. (212)
